name: NVIDIA Corporation
thesisSummary: Training, sim, and in-vehicle inference load rises with iteration on fleet software and domain expansion; validation work is recurring, not one-off.

name: Mobileye Global Inc.
thesisSummary: Roadmap credibility and regulatory visibility support REM and L2++ monetization; content per vehicle scales before full driverless economics.

name: Allstate Corporation
thesisSummary: Short predicated on gradual pressure on personal-auto economics, not a single quarter; severity and reserve noise can mask frequency for long stretches.

name: Ford Motor Company
thesisSummary: Thesis overstated near-term payoff from legacy transformation versus fleet-first and silicon-heavy names; cycle and mix dominated the outcome.
